content: The Self-Refine framework for iterative output improvement can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement pipeline that outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and static self-reflection methods. This combined approach leverages the non-supervised iterative structure of Self-Refine and the error-detection power of contrasting inconsistent solving perspectives to catch more blind spots in LLM outputs than either method alone.
